Class MassSpectra

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.device.AbstractDevice
org.episteme.jni.jni.devices.MassSpectra
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, AutoCloseable, Device, Sensor<Dimensionless>, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named, Spectrometer
public class MassSpectra extends AbstractDevice implements Spectrometer
Implementation of a Mass Spectrometer interacting via JNI.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:
